task_completion.description: Navigate the map to the target area approximately 10km North of Canberra.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows the area North of Canberra, or coordinates near -35.20, 149.13 are visible in the status bar coordinate display.

task_completion.description: Locate the cluster of five 'Sensor Node' points arranged in a 'dice' pattern.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct cluster of five point features arranged in a quincunx (the 'five' face of a dice) pattern is visible on the map canvas.

task_completion.description: Select or open the attributes of the central node in the cluster.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The central point of the five-node cluster is highlighted/selected on the map, or its specific feature form/attribute window is open.

task_completion.description: Update the 'notes' attribute of the central node to 'Master Hub'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attribute table or feature form for the central node clearly shows the 'notes' field has been changed to 'Master Hub'.
The attribute table or feature form for the other four nodes in the cluster shows their 'notes' field remains 'Unassigned', or there is no evidence of them being edited.

integrity.description: Agent used the GIS graphical user interface to edit attributes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Attribute edits are performed within the GIS application's attribute table or feature form, not via terminal commands, SQL scripts, or Python consoles.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual feature attributes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Master Hub' is typed into the correct field in the GIS software's UI, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with a live map canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas displays genuine rendered vector points with standard GIS UI elements (toolbars, layers panel), not a static image viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target coordinates for the cluster center: lat -35.20, lon 149.13. Feature name: 'Sensor Node'. Expected central node 'notes' value: 'Master Hub'. Expected peripheral nodes 'notes' value: 'Unassigned'.
